query: SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') as cpf_norm, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(nomeCompleto SEPARATOR ' | ') as nomes, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM clientes GROUP BY cpf_norm HAVING qtd > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') as cpf_norm, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(nomeCompleto SEPARATOR ' | ') as nomes, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM clientes GROUP BY cpf_norm HAVING qtd > 1;
